markets.question: Spread: Middlesbrough FC (-2.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming EFL Championship game, scheduled for April 6 at 12:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Middlesbrough FC" if Middlesbrough FC win the game by 3 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Swansea City AFC".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on efl.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.question: Rainbow Six Siege: Heretics vs Order of the Shield (BO3) - Europe MENA League Challenger Series Playoffs
markets.description:
This market refers to the Rainbow Six Siege Upper bracket quarterfinal 3 match between Heretics and Order of the Shield in the Europe MENA League Challenger Series Playoffs, initially scheduled for March 12 at 2:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Heretics" if Heretics win the match against Order of the Shield.

This market will resolve to "Order of the Shield" if Order of the Shield win the match against Heretics.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/rainbowsix/Main_Page. However, if https://liquipedia.net/rainbowsix/Main_Page has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

markets.description:
This market refers to the Rainbow Six Siege Upper bracket quarterfinal 3 match between Heretics and Order of the Shield in the Europe MENA League Challenger Series Playoffs, initially scheduled for March 12 at 2:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Over" if Heretics and Order of the Shield play 3 or more games in this series.

markets.question: Solana Up or Down - March 12, 7AM ET
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the SOL/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the SOL/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/SOL_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance SOL/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.
